footer.tagline: A university professor and academic researcher devoted to knowledge and scholarship.

hero.title: A Scholar and Academic Researcher in the Service of Knowledge
hero.subtitle: Over three decades of academic dedication in teaching, research, and authorship — committed to spreading knowledge and mentoring a new generation of researchers.

about.title: A Brief Introduction
about.text: Prof. Khaled is a seasoned university professor and researcher with significant contributions to his field through authorship, lectures, and scientific seminars. He blends academic depth with clear presentation and is dedicated to developing students’ research skills.

cta.title: Let’s Connect
cta.text: I am happy to respond to your academic and research inquiries and to exchange knowledge.
